mesa.hint: all - but needs GLX/EGL extension to be useful

api.name: Extensions that are not part of any OpenGL or OpenGL ES version

version.name: Extensions that are not part of any OpenGL or OpenGL ES version
Extensions that are not part of any Vulkan version

extension.name: Read from, write to, copy rectangular regions
Control OpenCL C version when building
Query for preferred work-group size multiple
Separate compilation and linking of programs
Retrieve kernels information from a program
Supported OpenCL C versions and features queries

mesa.hint: in progress (iris, llvmpipe, nvc0, radeonsi, zink, Available with environment variable RUSTICL_FEATURES=fp64, device dependent.)

extension.name: Latest conformance version passed for devices
